title: TrailGenic HR Drift Adaptation vs Fitness Dataset
description: Shell dataset module for TrailGenic physiology adaptation science modeling cardiovascular drift behavior during prolonged aerobic endurance activity.

records.mechanism: Cardiovascular drift during prolonged aerobic exercise
physiological_response: gradual increase in heart rate over time
adaptation_outcomes: improved cardiovascular stability during endurance exercise
reduced heart rate drift over time

supporting_science.finding: Cardiovascular drift during prolonged exercise is associated with reductions in stroke volume and increased heart rate.
Heart rate drift can serve as a practical marker of endurance efficiency and aerobic fitness.

adaptation_outcomes: reduced cardiovascular strain during heat exposure
greater endurance stability in warm environments

supporting_science.finding: Thermoregulatory demands contribute significantly to cardiovascular drift during prolonged exercise.
